qa_pairs.question: How can users list all available Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) flavours and full-size GPU names on a given cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To list all the flavours of MIGs (plus the full-size GPU names) available on a given cluster, one can run the following command: `sinfo -o "%G"|grep gpu|sed 's/gpu://g'|sed 's/),/\n/g'|cut -d: -f1|sort|uniq`.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find the recommended maximum number of CPU cores and system memory per GPU instance?
qa_pairs.answer: The recommended maximum number of CPU cores and amount of system memory per instance are listed in the 'table of ratios in bundles', which can be found in the Allocations and compute scheduling section.
